titleStmt.title: SII 9.173: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 173. (A.R. No. 95 of 1904.) ON THE 11TH SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 32, Sarvajit, Mārgaśira, amāvāsye, Sōmavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa, Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1107 December 16, Monday, when there was a solar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva whose Daṇḍanāyaka Barmmarasa is said to have granted one gadyāṇa per month out of the pannāya of the village Bāḷguḷi to the Mahājanas for the repairs of the tank Hiriyakeṟe, in the presence of the god Kalidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para
mēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttami
re © tatpādapadmōpajīvi samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmāttya
padavīvirājamānamānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasaṁ
pa(ṁ)nnaṁ nuḍidumattennanāśritajanakalpavṛkṣaṁ patikāryyadakṣaṁ gō
trapavitraṁ parāṁganāputra sāhasōttuṁganayyanasiṁgaṁ nā
mādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmadaccupannāyadadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ
daṇḍanāyakaṁ barmmarasar © svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramava
rṣa 32 neya sarbbajitsaṁvatsarada mārggasiradamāvāsye sōmavāraṁ sūryyagra
haṇaṁ byatīpātadaṁdu śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvaspāmidēvara sa(ṁ)nnidhānadoḷ svasti ya
maniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇapārāyaṇa
japasamādhisakaḷavastuguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmatu hariścaṁdradattiyagrahā
raṁ bāḷguḷiyūroḍeyapramukhamahājanamayvadiṁbara kālaṁ karcci dhārā
pūrbbaka(ṁ)mmāḍi hiriyakeṟeya kelasakke pa(ṁ)nnāyada suṁkadoḷage tiṁgaḷiṁgeyoṁ
du gadyāṇa ponnanalli naḍava perggaḍe karaṇaṁgaḷu kuḍutaṁ barppaṁtāgi biṭṭanintī dha
rmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge prayāge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrama
rgghyatīrtthadalu sāsirbbarvvēdapāragargge sāsira kavileyanubha
yamukhigoṭṭa phalamakkumī dharmmamanaḷidavarā
puṇyasthānaṁgaḷalanibaru brāhmaṇarumananitu kavileya
maṁ svahastavadheyaṁ māḍida pātakamakku ©
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasu(ṁ)ndharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣa
sahaśrāṇāṁ viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . saṁdā
tātsumahatsakhyaṁ duḥkhamanyatra pālanaṁ dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ
vēti dānātśrēyōnupālanāt . maṁgaḷa mahāśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 9.173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
